dismissalText.commentary: Josh Inglis c †Samson b Overton 85 (33b 10x4 6x6 55m) SR: 257.57

dismissalComment.html: Inglis fluffs the scoop, and Overton has his man! Shortish outside off and Inglis looks for that favoured scoop of his. Gets across his stumps and gets a nick too but it is not enough to beat Samson to his left. Sharp grab by the keeper, and Overton has answered CSK prayers again. Take nothing away from this sensational knock, though!

dismissalText.commentary: Mitchell Marsh c Brevis b Kamboj 10 (10b 0x4 1x6 28m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: Kamboj breaks through, and the crowd comes to life! Back of a length, slanting into middle and leg. Marsh looks to go downtown but shanks it a touch off the inside half. Brevis, stood at long on, takes it and then does a little juggling act without ever going out of bounds. Better to be safe than sorry, and Marsh has to depart for a run-a-ball 10!

dismissalText.long: c sub (SN Khan) b Noor Ahmad
dismissalText.commentary: Nicholas Pooran c sub (SN Khan) b Noor Ahmad 1 (3b 0x4 0x6 11m) SR: 33.33

dismissalComment.html: goes a mile up, and taken, eventually! Googly on a fullish length outside off. Pooran gets down on one knee and tries to smash it into the Bay of Bengal. Gets under it too much, though, and the ball hangs in the air for an eternity. Sarfaraz settles under it at deep mid wicket and does enough. Nearly made a meal of it, but emerged with the ball and with his smile intact. Vital wicket for CSK!

dismissalComment.html: chopped on, and Overton is absolutely pumped! The whistles turned up a notch, and LSG are now four down! Hard length on middle and leg, and this seems to gather pace after pitching. Pant has a loose poke at it and the ball cannons off the inside edge into his stumps. Overton has brought the crowd to life, and Pant walks back after a scratchy knock!

headshotImage.longCaption: Dewald Brevis, player page headshot cutout 2022

dismissalComment.html: a direct hit from the deep, and Markram might be outta here! DB with a moment of absolute fielding magic! Flighted up very full just outside off. Raghuwanshi tugs it to long on's right and the call is for two. Markram has to rush, though, and Brevis is sharp - both with his pick-up and then with his throw. Rifles a throw at the stumps, and Markram is gone for all money. LSG five down, and CSK on the prowl!

dismissalText.commentary: Akshat Raghuwanshi c Patel b Overton 18 (18b 1x4 0x6 26m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: spliced to mid off, and Overton is making Chepauk his stage again! Hard length outside off. Raghuwanshi looks to pop it downtown but cannot quite get on top of the bounce. Off the higher part of the blade and Urvil completes the most regulation of catches. LSG's slide continues!
